creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bugzilla is not to be used for:
1) telling maintainers that new versions are out
2) Asking for <x> to be made into a port.

Somebody needs to create the proposed port and attach it as a shar file on a PR: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html

There may be some kind of "ports wishlist" around, but I can't find it and probably nobody looks at it anyway.

Closing the PR, there's no one to assign it to and it does no good just opening it.
